title: zabelia tyaihyoni
intro: Zabelia tyaihyoni, also known as the Korean boxwood, is a small evergreen shrub native to Korea and Japan, characterized by its compact growth habit and fragrant leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Zabelia tyaihyoni include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are then consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
